summary: Comprehensive testing of DawaLink Admin Dashboard completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (21/21 tests passed). Frontend admin dashboard fully working with real data from MongoDB. All navigation pages functional.

issues: Company/Pharmacy name column is cut off on the left side - only partial text visible

passed_tests: Backend health check - API connected to MongoDB
Admin stats endpoint - returns correct counts (4 pharmacies, 4 suppliers, 13 products)
Admin pharmacies list - shows all 4 pharmacies with details
Admin suppliers list - shows all 4 suppliers with details
Admin products list - shows all 13 products with supplier info
Admin orders list - returns empty array (no orders)
Admin pending users - returns empty array (all approved)
Admin Tous les utilisateurs page navigation
Pharmacy dashboard - displays 13 products with prices
critical_code_review_comments: Admin login form uses 'Nom d'utilisateur' label but accepts email - consider changing label to 'Email' for clarity
seed_data_creation: Database pre-seeded via /api/seed with 2 admins, 4 suppliers, 4 pharmacies, 13 products, 6 agents
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin dashboard features working. Stats show: 4 pharmacies, 4 suppliers, 13 products, 0 orders. Admin can view/manage all users. Pharmacy can view products catalog. No pending users currently (all approved). Test credentials in login form helper text.
